title: Methodology Verification Gate Record

gates.gate: Nityanand Mishra ji methodology/style reference and Sanskrit/Hindi correctness verification required before calling it generated.
Traditional panchang source/calculation method and date/location logic verification required.
Reviewed-method, non-deterministic, source-backed guidance required; no invented mantra/unsupported claim.
Festival calendar/source verification required before public factual claim.

activation_rule: Modules behind methodology gates may remain visible only as clearly labelled reviewed-preview/static surfaces until AG60B/AG60C verifies generation and source method.
